name: Shake It and Bake It Coating
recipeInstructions: This mixture is sufficient to coat six pounds of chicken. In a large jar, shake together the flour, salt, pepper, crumbs, paprika, basil, thyme, and garlic powder until evenly mixed. If using only 3 pounds of chicken, place half of the mixture in a tightly sealed jar for later use. Moisten the chicken pieces with milk or water. Place chicken pieces one at a time into the bag and shake until evenly coated. Bake coated chicken pieces in a greased shallow pan at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 60 minutes.
